user.title: Generic Water Heater Setup
user.description:
Creates a virtual water heater that controls a switch using a temperature sensor.

Modes:
- electric: heats normally using target temperature and tolerances.
- performance (Boost): prioritizes heating, but still respects Smart Eco if enabled.

Smart Eco is controlled with a dedicated switch entity and uses the template below as the allow/block condition for heating.

Enable Debug Logging to capture detailed decision paths and state transitions in Home Assistant logs.

data_description.eco_mode_template_condition: Boolean template used by Smart Eco. When Smart Eco is ON and this template evaluates to false, heating is blocked. When Smart Eco is OFF, this template is ignored.
data_description.enable_debug_logging: Logs detailed runtime diagnostics, including mode transitions, heating/idle state transitions, threshold decisions, eco condition updates, manual overrides, and switch command/cooldown reasoning. Disabled by default.
data_description.enable_max_temp_history_sensor: Adds a sensor under the same device that tracks the highest recorded temperature over the last 7 days. Disabled by default.

init.title: Generic Water Heater Options
init.description:

Modes:

- performance (Boost): prioritizes heating, but still respects Smart Eco if enabled.

Smart Eco is controlled with a dedicated switch entity and uses the template below as the allow/block condition for heating.

data_description.enable_debug_logging: Logs detailed runtime diagnostics, including mode transitions, heating/idle state transitions, threshold decisions, eco condition updates, manual overrides, and switch command/cooldown reasoning. Disabled by default.
